overview.description: Agentic data trust platform for enterprise data quality, observability, governance, lineage, and master data management
overview.description_long: Ataccama is an agentic data trust company whose flagship product, Ataccama ONE, unifies data quality, observability, data catalog, data lineage, reference data management, and master data management in a single platform. The ONE AI Agent acts as a digital data steward that identifies issues, generates quality rules, and resolves data problems across the enterprise. Positioned as a 5-time Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for Augmented Data Quality Solutions, Ataccama helps large enterprises create trusted, AI-ready data for analytics, operations, and AI workloads. The company has a strategic partnership with Snowflake and received a strategic investment from Snowflake Ventures in December 2025.
overview.tagline: Trust your data, accelerate your AI

history.origin_story: Founded in Prague, Czech Republic in 2007. Originally a Czech data management software company that expanded internationally, relocating its headquarters to Boston, MA while maintaining a significant engineering presence in Prague.

key_milestones.event: Raised $150M growth investment from General Atlantic (Series B)
Launched agentic data trust platform with ONE AI Agent
Received strategic investment from Snowflake Ventures (December 2025)
Named Leader in 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Augmented Data Quality Solutions for 5th consecutive time
Named Leader in Forrester Wave: Data Quality Solutions Q1 2026

awards: Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader for Augmented Data Quality Solutions (5 consecutive years, 2022–2026)
Forrester Wave Leader: Data Quality Solutions Q1 2026

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: Ataccama provides deep enterprise data infrastructure — data quality pipelines, governance, lineage, and MDM — that AI models depend on for reliable inputs. Their platform is infrastructure-layer, not an AI application wrapper. Strong enterprise integrations (Snowflake, ERP systems) and multi-year deployment cycles create high switching costs. Their ONE AI Agent positions them as an AI enabler rather than a target for displacement.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: Data quality and governance is a well-established, growing market accelerated by enterprise AI adoption. Ataccama has been a Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader for 5 consecutive years, a Forrester Wave Leader, and counts T-Mobile, Prudential, and Fifth Third Bank as anchor clients — confirming strong product-market fit in large enterprise.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Raised $150M Series B from General Atlantic in 2022 and received a strategic investment from Snowflake Ventures in December 2025. With ~500 employees and strong enterprise bookings growth (36% QoQ new bookings reported), the company shows strong revenue signals and strategic backing.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: Ataccama is a well-funded data infrastructure scaleup with deep enterprise moats, a 5-time Gartner Leader designation, and strategic backing from Snowflake. Their positioning as the trusted data layer for AI makes them an enabler of AGI adoption rather than a displacement target. Low risk across all dimensions.

metadata.notes: Company HQ is listed as Boston, MA on LinkedIn, but was originally founded in Prague and maintains a significant Prague engineering office (Sokolovska 136f). The $150M Series B from General Atlantic (January 2022) is widely reported but was not directly verified from a live press release during this scraping session (General Atlantic page returned 404). Founders not confirmed — LinkedIn founding date 2007 is used. Glassdoor was blocked (security/captcha wall). Careers page returned 404; hiring_signals set to unknown.
